title: System login failure
description: Since this morning, the company CRM system shows a blank white screen after login and cannot access the main interface. Tried multiple computers and different browsers.

title: Inaccurate report data
description: In the monthly sales report, the East China region data doesn't match actual figures, with a discrepancy of about 150,000. Suspect there's an issue with the data source aggregation logic.

title: VPN connection failure
description: VPN connection fails when working from home, showing 'connection timed out'. Colleagues report similar issues.

title: System permission request
description: Need to grant CRM system customer query and ticket handling permissions for 3 newly onboarded customer service staff.
reporter: Supervisor Chen from Customer Service Dept

title: Broken office chair needs replacement
description: The office chair at R&D area workstation #3 has a broken hydraulic lift and cannot adjust height. Needs a replacement chair.

title: Email storage full
description: Corporate email shows storage is full and cannot send or receive new emails. Deleted some old emails but space is releasing slowly.
